pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 30 confirms file is copied to /home/ga/LCA_Imports/uslci_database.zip; install_openlca.sh downloads from GitHub FLCAC as uslci_database.zip

Web search confirms USLCI database contains multiple natural gas processes: 'Natural gas, production mixture, at extraction', 'Electricity, at cogen, for natural gas turbine', 'Transport, pipeline, natural gas' verified on lcacommons.gov. Task description states goal to find processes using 'Natural gas (or similar variants) as an input'.
Confirmed in setup_task.sh line 18 and export_result.sh line 25 which checks for file at /home/ga/LCA_Results/natural_gas_dependency.csv

Task description explicitly states: 'Create a supply chain dependency report listing at least 5 different processes that directly consume natural gas.' Verifier checks for >= 5 data rows (line 128-130 of verifier.py).

Task description requires CSV with 'Process Name', 'Amount', and 'Unit'. Verifier (lines 100-102) checks for flexible matching: header must contain 'process'/'name'/'flow' AND 'amount'/'value'/'quantity' AND 'unit'. OpenLCA process table structure documented to include flow properties with amount and unit fields.

pi_items.verified_value: USLCI FY24 Q4 from GitHub FLCAC repository (uslci-content)
pi_items.source: install_openlca.sh lines 173-187 download from GitHub: https://github.com/FLCAC-admin/uslci-content/raw/dev/downloads/uslci_fy24_q4_01_olca2_4_0_elci_lib_json_ld.zip. GitHub FLCAC is official USLCI release repository. GreenDelta Nextcloud URL in install_openlca.sh (line 62) is alternate OpenLCA distribution method, not USLCI data source.

pi_items.verified_value: USLCI contains 550-660+ processes including fuels, transport, metals, chemicals, resins, paper, electronics, building materials
pi_items.source: Web search confirms USLCI has 'more than 550 process LCIs' (NREL documentation) and later updates cite '660+ process LCIs'. FLCAC manages official releases with quarterly updates.
Web search found official openLCA release page at openLCA.org confirming v2.6.0 release on December 22, 2025. Install script specifies 2025-12-15 which does not match official release date.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses the real U.S. Life Cycle Inventory Database (USLCI FY24 Q4) maintained by NREL and FLCAC, containing 550+ actual LCA processes. The database is in OpenLCA-compatible JSON-LD format and is downloaded from the official FLCAC GitHub repository. Multiple natural gas-related processes are confirmed to exist in the USLCI database (including natural gas production, electricity from natural gas turbines, and pipeline transport). The task requires agents to identify and export at least 5 natural gas processes to a CSV file with process name, amount, and unit columns. All metadata claims about file locations, required output structure, and minimum row counts are verified against task scripts and verifier logic.
